# AIForge — Full Index for LLMs

> Expanded llms.txt (see https://llmstxt.org/). AIForge is a curated index of the AI/ML/DL/LLM/Data-Science ecosystem: ~1,550 documents, 5,000+ links, organized into 5 pillars + a Frontier AI 2026 radar. Canonical names, no duplicates. Full sitemap: INDEX.md.

Repository: https://github.com/FELIPEACASTRO/AIForge | License: MIT


## 00_FRONTIER_AI_2026
